entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important leguminous food crop rich in high-quality protein grown in tropical and subtropical regions.

entities.name: TROPICAL AND SUBTROPICAL REGIONS
entities.description: Regions where pigeonpea is primarily grown.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses including weeds, diseases, and insect pests that reduce pigeonpea production.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental stresses that reduce pigeonpea production.

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A major insect pest of pigeonpea, also known as the pod borer.

entities.name: POD BORER RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea to resist attack by Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: An effective approach for developing high-yielding and pest-resistant cultivars.

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: A component trait of pigeonpea related to flowering time.

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: A component trait of pigeonpea related to the time taken to reach maturity.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A component trait of pigeonpea measuring the amount of grain produced.

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to obtain genomic data for identifying single nucleotide polymorphisms.

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Genetic variations used as markers for association studies.

entities.name: MULTI-LOCUS GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: An analysis used to detect marker-trait associations across the genome.

entities.name: SUPER
entities.description: A GWAS model based on settlement of MLM under progressively exclusive relationship.

entities.name: FARMPCU
entities.description: A GWAS model based on fixed and random model circulating probability unification.

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Significant links between genetic markers and specific phenotypic traits.

entities.name: PROBABLE CARBOXYLESTERASE 15
entities.description: A candidate gene associated with pod borer resistance.

entities.name: MICROTUBULE-ASSOCIATED PROTEIN 5
entities.description: A candidate gene associated with pod borer resistance.

entities.name: FAR1-RELATED SEQUENCE
entities.description: A candidate gene associated with pod borer resistance.

entities.name: OMEGA-HYDROXYPALMITATE O-FERULOYL TRANSFERASE 4
entities.description: A candidate gene associated with pod borer resistance.

entities.name: RING-H2 FINGER PROTEIN ATL7
entities.description: A candidate gene associated with days to maturity.

entities.name: LEUCINE-RICH REPEAT RECEPTOR-LIKE PROTEIN KINASE
entities.description: A candidate gene associated with days to maturity.

entities.name: SECRETORY CARRIER-ASSOCIATED MEMBRANE PROTEIN
entities.description: A candidate gene associated with grain yield.

entities.name: GLUTAREDXIN-C5 CHLOROPLASTIC
entities.description: A candidate gene associated with grain yield.

entities.name: POD BIOASSAY SCREENING
entities.description: A lab-based screening method used to identify resistant genotypes.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA MINICORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A set of 146 pigeonpea accessions used for evaluation of traits.
